title: Clear Glass
body:
**Clear Glass** is the essential texture pack for builders who value **clarity** and seamless design. This pack removes the distracting borders and visual noise from vanilla glass, giving you truly transparent windows.

**Note:** For the connected glass effect to work, you must use **OptiFine** or **Continuity**

[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/2214083e-89b0-4b45-8aa0-d262c4255507.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/nikinok)
